svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/26.2.2 Chrome/134.0.6998.178 Electron/35.1.2 Safari/537.36" version="26.2.2"> <diagram id="sys-overview" name="System Architecture Overview"> <mxGraphModel dx="-802" dy="-229" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1600" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" value="Sentinel Gateway 
System Architecture" style="text;html=1;fontSize=22;fontStyle=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="550" y="20" width="500" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="qemu_host" value="QEMU Host (Vast.ai GPU Server)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=center;spacingTop=5;shadow=1;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 8;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="80" y="90" width="1440" height="700" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="linux_vm" value="QEMU ARM64 
Linux Gateway (SE-01)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=center;spacingTop=5;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="120" y="140" width="600" height="580" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gw_core" value="gateway_core
(epoll event loop)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=10;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="160" y="200" width="160" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sensor_proxy" value="sensor_proxy
(receive + cache)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="160" y="280" width="140" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="actuator_proxy" value="actuator_proxy
(send + wait ack)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="320" y="280" width="140" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="health_mon" value="health_monitor
(heartbeat + recovery)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="480" y="280" width="150" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="diagnostics" value="diagnostics
(TCP CLI :5002)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="160" y="360" width="140" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="config_mgr" value="config_manager" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="320" y="360" width="140" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="logger" value="logger
(JSON Lines, rotation)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e6d0de;strokeColor=#996185;fontSize=10;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="480" y="360" width="150" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tcp_transport" value="tcp_transport (wire framing, epoll)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=10;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="160" y="440" width="470" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="protobuf_c" value="protobuf-c (encode/decode)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="160" y="500" width="470" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="linux_os" value="Yocto Linux (Poky) 
 kernel + systemd + USB host" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=10;dashed=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="160" y="555" width="470" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="usb_host" value="USB CDC-ECM Host
(usb0: 192.168.7.1)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="260" y="615" width="220" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="log_store" value="/var/log/sentinel/
sensor_data.jsonl
events.jsonl" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#deebf7;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=9;size=10;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="500" y="440" width="120" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mcu_vm" value="QEMU ARM 
STM32U575 MCU (SE-02)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=center;spacingTop=5;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="820" y="140" width="660" height="580" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mcu_main" value="main_loop
(super-loop scheduler)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=10;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="880" y="200" width="160" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sensor_acq" value="sensor_acquisition
(ADC + calibrate)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="860" y="280" width="150" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="actuator_ctrl" value="actuator_control
(validate + PWM)
ASIL-B" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="1030" y="280" width="150" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="health_rep" value="health_reporter
(1Hz heartbeat)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="1200" y="280" width="140" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="wdg_mgr" value="watchdog_mgr
(IWDG 2s)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="860" y="360" width="130" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="config_st" value="config_store
(flash + CRC)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="1010" y="360" width="130" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nanopb" value="protobuf_handler (nanopb)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="1160" y="360" width="180" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tcp_lwip" value="tcp_stack (lwIP NO_SYS)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=10;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="860" y="440" width="480" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hal_bar" value="HAL: adc_driver | pwm_driver | gpio_driver | flash_driver | usb_cdc" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=10;dashed=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="860" y="505" width="480" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="adc_hw" value="ADC1
4ch 12bit" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#deebf7;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="870" y="565" width="80" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tim_hw" value="TIM2
PWM 25kHz" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#deebf7;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="970" y="565" width="80" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="iwdg_hw" value="IWDG
2s timeout" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#deebf7;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="1070" y="565" width="80" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="flash_hw" value="Flash
NVM config" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#deebf7;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=9;size=8;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="1170" y="555" width="80" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="usb_dev" value="USB CDC-ECM Device
(192.168.7.2)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="980" y="630" width="220" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="usb_link" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=3;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="usb_host" target="usb_dev" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="usb_link_lbl" value="USB 2.0 FS
TCP/IP + Protobuf" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#6c8ebf;" parent="usb_link" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry x="-0.1" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint y="-5" as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sensors" value="Sensors
(Temp, Humidity,
Pressure, Light)" style="shape=parallelogram;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;perimeter=parallelogramPerimeter;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="1360" y="170" width="130" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sens_edge" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="sensors" target="sensor_acq" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="actuators" value="Actuators
(Fan, Valve)" style="shape=parallelogram;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;perimeter=parallelogramPerimeter;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="1360" y="260" width="130" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="act_edge" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="actuator_ctrl" target="actuators" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="diag_client" value="Diagnostic
Client" style="shape=actor;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=10;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="30" y="340" width="60" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="diag_edge" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#9673a6;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" source="diag_client" target="diagnostics" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="diag_edge_lbl" value="TCP :5002" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=9;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#9673a6;" parent="diag_edge" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="port_5000" value=":5000 Commands" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontStyle=2;align=center;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#666666;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="700" y="650" width="100" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="port_5001" value=":5001 Telemetry" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontStyle=2;align=center;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#666666;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="700" y="670" width="100" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend" value="Legend" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FAFAFA;strokeColor=#CCCCCC;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingTop=2;spacingLeft=8;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="80" y="770" width="500" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg_infra" value="Infrastructure" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=8;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="90" y="775" width="70" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg_app" value="Application" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=8;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="170" y="775" width="70" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg_safety" value="Safety (ASIL-B)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=8;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="250" y="775" width="80" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg_core" value="Core Logic" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=8;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="340" y="775" width="70" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg_proto" value="Protocol" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=8;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="420" y="775" width="60" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg_store" value="Storage" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#deebf7;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=8;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="490" y="775" width="60" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
